title: Senior Revenue Manager at IRCTC Tourism

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at IRCTC Tourism
jsonLd.description:
IRCTC Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Kochi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IRCTC Tourism:
IRCTC Tourism is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IRCTC Tourism!
